indicators.name: hard industrial surfaces
indicators.rationale: The hard industrial surfaces, such as the concrete floor and exposed brick walls, are incompatible with a sleep environment.

indicators.name: open layout
indicators.rationale: The open layout with visible through-traffic cues and lack of privacy makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no horizontal rest surface
indicators.rationale: There is no bed or other horizontal rest surface present in the image.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (primary). The hard industrial surfaces, open layout, and lack of horizontal rest surface make it unsuitable for sleep. The presence of a bar area and visible through-traffic cues further contribute to the unsuitability.
